dungeon: Realm/godlands maxing+event-farm stream (TURFSCRUB) — Epic Enemies, Galactic Zones, crates, Asgard
map: DOCUMENTED biomes: standard Realm/godlands (grass, desert, beach), red/dark boss structures, void/space zones, pet/vault UI. Event/Galactic-boss farming across the realm.

bosses.name: Epic Mysterious Card (EPIC ENEMY)
taunts: With my sleight of hand, I will make you disappear!
bosses.note: An 'Epic'-tier enemy (Epic Enemies system). Killed players. Has its own taunt.

bosses.name: Epic Riverborn (EPIC ENEMY)
bosses.note: Epic-tier version of Riverborn (Riverside Refuge boss). Killed a player ('killed by Epic Riverborn').

bosses.name: Asgard Guardian
bosses.note: Heimdall's 'guardians' minions = 'Asgard Guardian' (confirmed name). Lethal — killed multiple players.

bosses.name: Lucky Djinn (Galactic)
bosses.note: '<Hobbit> Lucky Djinn has just spawned!' — Galactic-zone boss.

drops: Special Crate -> Potion of Speed / Potion of Vitality
mechanics:
MAJOR cross-system recovery (all DOCUMENTED from chat):
- EPIC ENEMIES (Phase D1): 'Epic'-prefixed elite enemies roam and are deadly — Epic Mysterious Card (taunt 'With my sleight of hand, I will make you disappear!'), Epic Riverborn. They kill players and have their own taunts/loot.
- GALACTIC /COUNTER (Phase D3): announcer posts 'The <Boss> has been defeated! (N/30)' — counter goal here is /30 (Mysterious Card 7/30, Mad Jester 5/30, Lord of the Lost Lands 8/30). NOTE: /30 here vs /25 in other streams -> counter total likely varies by zone tier/version. Galactic bosses: Mysterious Card, Mad Jester, Lord of the Lost Lands, Lucky Djinn, (Lucky Ent God prior).
- LODESTONES (Phase D2): 'Magical Lodestone' is a legendary item (Nodestone/Lodestone family).
- SPECIAL CRATE economy: unboxing a 'Special Crate' yields specific gear (Pirate King's Cutlass, Harlequin Armor, Frenzying Quiver) or potions.
- DAMAGE-THRESHOLD LOOT: '[player] just got some legendary loot; [Magical Lodestone] obtained with 1% damage dealt!' (>=1% damage -> loot eligibility).
- POTION-TO-MAX counter (Dex/Wis/Def/Spd/Vit, 'N left to max'). Uvuvwevwevwe spawns ('<Satyr> Uvuvwevwevwe has just spawned!'). Announcer personas: Satyr, Hobbit (+ Loot Notifier, Death Notifier).
uncertain: Some lines clipped at chat right edge. /30 vs /25 counter discrepancy noted (tier/version-dependent). Epic-enemy attack patterns not visually isolated.
confidence: HIGH — DOCUMENTS the Epic Enemies system (named epic bosses + a verbatim Epic taunt), the Galactic /30 counter + new boss Lucky Djinn, the Magical Lodestone item, three Special-Crate gear items, and the 1%-damage loot rule. Cross-cuts Phases D1/D2/D3.
